messages.text: The First Hum gathers itself to sound the Underhum — the first wordless tone of the world drawing up from the source, the pale cold stone thrumming as the note that was never a voice rises toward you. There is a moment, only a moment, before it rolls over you.
The First Hum gathers itself to sound the Underhum, the first tone the world ever made rising cold and wordless from the source.

The First Hum gathers itself and sounds, at last, its whole self at once — the Underhum, the first wordless tone the world ever made, older than the Choir's chord and the Unsung's silence both, and it rolls out of the source and folds over you like the cold at the bottom of everything, drowning breath and warmth and thought under a note that was never a voice and cannot be refused. The blow {verb} you!

The First Hum looses the Underhum and the whole sphere rings with the first sound the world ever made, and you press flat to the pale cold stone and let the drowning tone wash over you until it passes.

The First Hum bends the entire Underhum down onto you alone, the tone the Choir imitated and the Unsung fled made into a single crushing column of cold, and for one endless drowning moment you are folded into it completely, your own bones humming the note that will unmake you! The blow {verb} you!
